channel.title: Vox Language Updates
channel.description: Changelog, release notes, and documentation updates for the Vox AI-native programming language, maintained by the Vox Foundation.

item.title: Vox Orchestration Build Stabilization Findings (2026-04-21)
item.description: Vox Orchestration Build Stabilization Findings (2026-04-21)

item.title: Data Storage Lint & CI Spec (2026)
item.description: Concrete lint and CI rules — clippy.toml additions, deny.toml bans, grep checks, a new `vox ci data-storage-guard` subcommand, and diffs against the *real* `.gitlab-ci.yml` `vox-ci-guards` job and `.github/workflows/ci.yml` — that implement the regression gates called for by the Data Storage SSOT. Every rule is small, specific, paired with a finding ID, and references a file path that resolves against HEAD.

item.title: Data Storage Migration Backlog (2026)
item.description: Data Storage Migration Backlog (2026)

item.title: Data Storage SSOT (2026)
item.description: Data Storage SSOT (2026)

item.title: Feature growth and boundaries SSOT (2026)
item.description: Governance for the Vox feature surface, crate sprawl limits, and the deterministic projection parity gate.

item.title: Inference Tuning Resolution Research 2026
item.description: Research into precedence-based parameter resolution for LLM inference.

item.title: Model Orchestration SSOT — Audit & Convergence Plan (2026-04-20)
item.description: Audit of Vox model selection, orchestration, telemetry, discovery, and mesh-secret distribution; proposes a single source of truth and a concrete backlog of ~70 improvements.

item.title: Telemetry-Driven Cost Accounting Architecture (2026)
item.description: Telemetry-Driven Cost Accounting Architecture (2026)

item.title: Clavis SSOT
item.description: Canonical secret-management source of truth for Vox Clavis

item.title: cli
item.description: Documentation for cli.md

item.title: Vox Language Benchmark: Developer Velocity & K-Complexity (2026)
item.description: Vox Language Benchmark: Developer Velocity & K-Complexity (2026)

item.title: Ludus Adjudication System — Implementation Plan (2026)
item.description: Ludus Adjudication System — Implementation Plan (2026)

item.title: Ludus Identity Federation & GitHub Integration
item.description: Research findings and architecture plan for decentralized Ludus profile storage and GitHub account linking.

item.title: Ludus Security and Anti-Cheat Architecture (Research 2026)
item.description: Ludus Security and Anti-Cheat Architecture (Research 2026)

item.title: Vox v1.0 Release Criteria (Hardened)
item.description: Vox v1.0 Release Criteria (Hardened)

item.title: Vox: The Agentic Foundation for 2026
item.description: Vox: The Agentic Foundation for 2026

item.title: Research: Workspace Health & Dependency Governance (2026)
item.description: Research: Workspace Health & Dependency Governance (2026)

item.title: Case Study: First Production Deployment (v1.0 Gate)
item.description: A walkthrough of deploying a real web application using Vox's single-command deployment pipeline.

item.title: Agent Planning Prompts
item.description: Prompt-engineered system directives for chunked file writing to avoid LLM token exhaustion.

item.title: Documentation governance
item.description: Authority map, taxonomy, status vocabulary, and maintenance rules for Vox documentation.

item.title: How-To: Deploy to Production
item.description: Declarative deployment using the environment keyword and the vox deploy command for OCI-compatible containerization.

item.title: AI IDE Feature Matrix (2026)
item.description: AI IDE Feature Matrix (2026)

item.title: CLI command surface (generated)
item.description: Auto-generated table of vox command paths and metadata; CLI rows are generated from contracts/operations/catalog.v1.yaml into command-registry.yaml — use vox ci operations-sync --target cli --write then vox ci command-sync --write.

item.title: What's Shipped Today
item.description: What's Shipped Today

item.title: Comprehensive Vox audit and improvement plan (April 2026, v2)
item.description: Full-spectrum audit + ~90 prioritized improvements. Targets the 'premier LLM destination for web app code' thesis.

item.title: v0.8.0 — @require, @pure, @deprecated Decorators; 10 LSP Features
item.description: Added @require, @pure, and @deprecated decorators. Implemented 10 Language Server Protocol features including hover, go-to-definition, and inline diagnostics.

item.title: v0.7.0 — QLoRA Training Pipeline; Socrates Anti-Hallucination Protocol
item.description: Native QLoRA fine-tuning via Candle and qlora-rs. Socrates confidence protocol integrated into the orchestrator for anti-hallucination validation of agent outputs.

item.title: v0.6.0 — Mens Transport; Durable Workflow Runtime MVP
item.description: CPU-first mens registry with optional HTTP control plane. Interpreted workflow runtime MVP supporting local and mens activity hooks.
